jobs.job_description:
Job Opportunity - Software Engineer

Company Profile : Location : Thane West

WonderBiz helps Heads of Engineering build “software products”, leveraging Technology that helps global companies to improve operational efficiency and reduce costs.

11+ years in the Business, 30+ International Customers, 50+ Products developed & counting, with clients from the Silicon Valley & Fortune 100 Companies.

Highly Growth-Driven work culture. Opportunity to work with an insane Dev. team – together for many years now – led by many passionate Software Engineers themselves having a rich industry experience of 20+ years.

WonderBiz builds products that help to leverage Technology to make a difference for our Customers.

You will find that the biggest benefit to working at WonderBiz is the exposure to a rich genre of software problems to solve and the opportunity to work on cutting-edge technologies. We offer other benefits: Laptop-based development environment, Exciting & friendly open office work environment, Strong process oriented.

We’re looking for people – passionate, experienced, high caliber, energetic, grounded, roll-up sleeves with can-do, will-do, can-learn, will-learn outlook. We’re building a company where initiative is admired, intelligence & creativity is rewarded and managers are here to remove roadblocks. If this is the type of place that you’ve been looking for, then come check us out!

Skills required: C#, ASP.Net, TCP/IP, MVC, Web Services, WCF, JavaScript, Jquery,

HTML, CSS, Sql server.

Responsibilities

This is a unique, full time opportunity for an individual, who is seeking new challenges.

In this role you will work as a junior member of the Product Development team to manage the delivery of scalable, high-performance solutions for web applications and services.

We were looking for .Net Developers/Freshers with basic knowledge of .Net Framework. OOPS and RDBMS concepts, to be a part of a skilled, results-oriented team.

We’ve been developing web applications based on custom needs for our esteemed clients and we want someone with as much passion for the .Net as we have.

Create and deliver applications meeting aggressive timelines & high quality expectations of customers utilizing agile methodologies.

Prototype and reiterate designs in collaboration with other team members.

Do a rapid prototyping of applications based on high level requirements

Work with multiple deployment environments viz. Development, Staging, Production

Education

UG: B.Tech/B.E. in Any Specialization

jobs.job_title: Junior Software Engineer- 5G RAN- Tieto Tech Consulting (m/f/d)
jobs.job_description:
Job Description

Job name: Junior 5G RAN Protocol Developer- L1/L2

Exp: 2-4 Years

Location: Bangalore

We are seeking a talented and experienced Software Engineer specializing in 5G RAN L1/L2 to join our team in Bangalore, India. In this role, you will be at the forefront of developing cutting-edge software for 5G Radio Access Network (RAN) technologies, focusing on Layer 1 (Physical Layer) and Layer 2 (Data Link Layer) protocols.
• Design, develop, and optimize software for 5G RAN L1/L2 components
• Implement and integrate 5G protocols according to 3GPP specifications
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure seamless integration of software components
• Conduct thorough testing and debugging of developed software
• Optimize code for performance, scalability, and efficiency
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to continuous improvement initiatives
• Stay updated with the latest advancements in 5G technology and wireless communications
• Document technical specifications, designs, and test results
• Troubleshoot complex issues and provide innovative solutions

Qualifications
• 2+ years of experience in software development for wireless communications
• Strong proficiency in C/C++ programming languages
• In-depth knowledge of 5G RAN protocols, particularly L1/L2
• Familiarity with 3GPP specifications and standards
• Experience with real-time operating systems and embedded software development
• Proficiency in version control systems, preferably Git
• Strong debugging and performance optimization skills
• Experience with 4G LTE technologies is a plus
• Excellent analytical and problem-solving abilities
• Strong attention to detail and organizational skills
• Ability to work efficiently in a fast-paced, collaborative environment
• Excellent written and verbal communication skills

Qualifications

Bachelor's or master's degree in computer science, Electrical Engineering, or a related field

Additional Information

At Tieto, we believe in the power of diversity, equity, and inclusion. We encourage applicants of all backgrounds, genders (m/f/d), and walks of life to join our team, as we believe that this fosters an inspiring workplace and fuels innovation. Our commitment to openness, trust, and diversity is at the heart of our mission to create digital futures that benefit businesses, societies, and humanity.

Diversity, equity and inclusion (tietoevry.com)

Junior Test Engineer Management Level I Role: Junior Test Engineer Location: Bengaluru About Organization: EQ is a leading international provider of shareholder, pension, remediation, and credit technology. With over 5,000 employees across UK, US, India, and Poland, it supports 37 Million people in 120 countries. EQ’s purpose is to care for every customer and simplify every transaction, delivered with less of an impact on the environment. EQ’ vision is to be the leading global share registrar, offering complementary services to its client base. Equiniti is a company that has been built with strong values at the very core of our offering. Dealing with some of the most successful companies and government agencies, excellence, integrity, professionalism, partnership, commercial and innovation are therefore at the heart of everything we do. The Junior Test Engineer role is for someone at the start of their engineering career. They are involved in specific, defined tasks and are supported by other engineers to deliver, whilst building their domain knowledge. They are aware of and seek to fully understand the department strategies, practices, toolkits and processes. Professional Responsibilities • Involve yourself in the implementation of software development processes, standards, and best practices to ensure consistent delivery of high-quality software products while ensuring you adhere to the over-arching Software Development Lifecycle and Agile TOM aligned to your Home • Aim for individual engineering excellence and quality through appropriate use of analysis tools, control gates and peer reviews by inculcating news ways of thinking to improve design, productivity, and quality • Show interest in the evaluation of emerging technologies, models, methods etc. on an ongoing basis to enable competitive differentiation and strengthening of existing product technology; involve yourself in adoption of these within your squad as required • Be proficient in and, where possible contribute towards optimization of, the engineering lifecycle through a systematic knowledge management and continuous learning process to better enable the organization to meet market and client needs • Participate in reviews for inculcating new ways of thinking to improve design, quality, etc. to drive higher engineering productivity and quality • Escalate, document, and manage issues related to product design, feature set, and functionality at appropriate levels to ensure delivery goals are met as per defined plans Technical Responsibilities • Designs, codes, verifies, tests, documents, amends and refactors simple programs/scripts. • Applies agreed standards and tools to achieve a well-engineered result. • Reviews own work. Education and Experience • Any technical graduation; engineering, computer science, etc. • Preferred, post-graduation in advanced computer science subjects and MBA in Systems • Understanding of engineering development for a Product SaaS organisation Professional Skills and Qualities • Agile Methodologies – Scrum & Safe • V Model/Water Fall Model • Efficiency improvement Personal Skills and Qualities • Emotional intelligence and empathy • Motivation, enthusiasm and optimism • Collaboration, teamwork and cooperation • Active listening and observation • Continuous learning Technical Experience at Foundational Level • Any Automation tools with Java, JavaScript knowledge • Functional Testing • BDD, Cucumber • Leveraged AI tools in day-to-day work to improve productivity, analysis, and test design • Knowledge to write SQL/DB query • ADO EQ India Benefits: Being a permanent member of the team at EQ you will be rewarded by our company benefits, these are just a few of what is on offer: 37 days + 9 bank holidays (UK) Comprehensive Medical & Life Assurance cover Maternity leave of 6 months full pay, 10days paid paternity leave Long Term Incentive Plan (LTIP) for all colleagues Accidental & Life cover 2 times of concerned CTC We are committed to equality of opportunity for all staff and applications from individuals are encouraged regardless of age, disability, sex, gender reassignment, sexual orientation, pregnancy and maternity, race, religion or belief and marriage and civil partnerships. Please note any offer of employment is subject to satisfactory pre-employment screening checks. Experience Level Entry Level

🚀 Hiring: Golang Developer (Junior & Senior)

📍 Location: Bangalore, Mumbai, Gurgaon

💼 Employment Type: Full-Time

🕒 Notice Period: Immediate to 30 Days Preferred

Experience & SalaryJunior Golang Developer

• Experience: 1–4 Years
• Salary: ₹7–12 LPA

Senior Golang Developer

• Experience: 4–9 Years
• Salary: ₹15–25 LPA

About The Role

We are looking for passionate and skilled Golang Developers to join our growing engineering team. You'll be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining scalable backend services, REST APIs, and cloud-native applications. This role is ideal for developers who enjoy solving complex technical challenges and building high-performance distributed systems.

Key Responsibilities

• Design, develop, and maintain backend applications using Golang.
• Build scalable, secure, and high-performance RESTful APIs and microservices.
• Collaborate with frontend developers, DevOps engineers, QA, and product teams.
• Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code following best practices.
• Optimize application performance, reliability, and scalability.
• Integrate databases, third-party APIs, and cloud services.
• Participate in code reviews and technical discussions.
• Troubleshoot production issues and implement effective solutions.
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions.

Required Skills

• Strong experience with Golang (Go)
• REST APIs & Microservices
• Goroutines & Channels
• SQL (PostgreSQL/MySQL)
• NoSQL (MongoDB/Redis)
• Git & GitHub
• Docker
• Kubernetes (Preferred)
• Kafka/RabbitMQ (Preferred)
• AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Linux Environment
• Unit Testing
• CI/CD Pipelines
• Performance Optimization

Preferred Qualifications

• Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, IT, or related field.
• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
• Experience with cloud-native application development.
• Knowledge of distributed systems and scalable architecture.
• Excellent communication and teamwork skills.

Why Join Us?

• Competitive Salary Package
• Work on Scalable Enterprise Applications
• Latest Cloud & Backend Technologies
• Career Growth Opportunities
• Collaborative Engineering Culture
• Learning & Development Programs
• Performance-Based Rewards

Job Details

• Role: Golang Developer (Junior & Senior)
• Employment Type: Full-Time
• Locations: Bangalore, Mumbai, Gurgaon
• Experience: 1–9 Years
• Notice Period: Up to 30 Days Preferred

Apply Now: 9742393844 (WhatsApp

Apply Here: https://artha.link/@jyothish-kumar

Skills: rest apis & microservices,sql (postgresql/mysql),golang (go),docker,aws, azure, or gcp

Junior Software Developer

Location: Sion, Mumbai, IN
Type: Full-time
Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM
Reports To: Engineering Manager

About Decisions

Decisions is a fast-growing, private-equity-backed technology company revolutionizing business process automation (BPA). Our no-code platform integrates AI tools, rules engines, and workflow management to help Fortune 500 firms and SMBs modernize legacy systems, transform customer experiences, and achieve automation goals—three times faster than traditional development.

We’re expanding our Mumbai team and looking for passionate junior developers ready to launch their careers in .NET and C#. If you’re eager to learn, build real-world applications, and grow in a collaborative environment, we want to hear from you.

What You’ll Do

• Collaborate with product managers, designers, and senior developers to build and support software applications

• Analyze requirements and design software using OOP principles and modern programming logic

• Develop and maintain our business automation platform

• Participate in performance testing, debugging, and continuous improvement

What You’ll Learn

• Hands-on experience with ASP.NET MVC, C#, .NET, Docker, React, and HTML5

• Exposure to real-world SDLC practices and agile methodologies

• Structured onboarding and mentorship from senior engineers

• Weekly learning sessions and access to internal knowledge base

• Opportunities to contribute to production code within your first quarter

What We’re Looking For

• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Engineering, or Math

• Completion of formal or informal training in C# or React, such as bootcamps, online courses, or academic modules

• Hands-on experience building software projects—even if they were for educational purposes, personal learning, or portfolio development

• Strong grasp of object-oriented programming (OOP) concepts

• Familiarity with at least two of the following: C#, .NET, ASP.NET MVC, JavaScript, React, HTML5, CSS

• Analytical mindset and problem-solving skills

• Clear communication and a collaborative spirit

• Eagerness to learn new technologies and take initiative

• Ability to meet deadlines and manage priorities effectively

What You’ll Get

• Competitive starting salary

• Health insurance and paid time off

• Monthly feedback check-ins and quarterly growth reviews

• A supportive team that invests in your development

Fresh Graduate Friendly

This role is ideal for recent graduates or developers with up to 1 year of experience. If you’re looking for your first break in software development and want to grow in a modern .NET environment, apply now.

As a Junior Software Developer, you’ll play a key role in building impactful, customer-focused solutions that drive the future of business worldwide.

We’re not just developing software; we’re shaping the next generation of tech leaders—those who don’t just fix problems, but create opportunities and design the solutions of tomorrow.

jobs.job_title: Junior Software Developer (Python & JavaScript / Frappe/OODO ERP)
jobs.job_description:
We're hiring a Junior to Mid-Level Software Developer!

Join our growing team to work on ERPNext/Frappe or Odoo customization, Python, JavaScript & React, REST APIs, PostgreSQL/MySQL, bug fixing, feature enhancements, and performance optimization.

About the Role

Join the CX Testing team to validate the quality, performance, and scalability of every release from the customer's perspective. You'll own performance validation end to end — workload design, load/stress/endurance testing, bottleneck analysis, and root-cause triage — across On-prem and SaaS environments. We're looking for someone hands-on and analytical who folds modern AI tooling (agents, LLMs) into the testing workflow to move faster.

What You'll Do
• Design and execute load, stress, endurance, and scalability tests for new features and releases
• Build and maintain automated performance scripts (JMeter, Locust, Gatling, K6, or similar)
• Run API performance testing against REST endpoints and backend systems
• Analyse metrics, isolate bottlenecks, and deliver actionable recommendations to dev teams
• Establish baselines and track performance regressions across releases
• Integrate performance tests into CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins / GitHub Actions)
• Drive performance triage and root-cause analysis through to resolution
• Leverage AI agents and LLMs to accelerate test creation, log/metric analysis, and triage

Must-Have
• 4+ years in performance or API testing only / UI and API Testing
• Load testing framework expertise (Locust/JMeter//Gatling/K6) with Python or Java
• API testing proficiency — REST APIs, HTTP protocols, backend systems
• Strong Python or Java scripting skills
• CI/CD integration experience (Jenkins preferred)
• Performance analysis with observability tools (Grafana, Prometheus, etc)
• Working knowledge of AI tooling — agents and LLMs in a testing/analysis context
• Solid grasp of distributed systems, system architecture, and database context.
• Git/GitHub; cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP)

Nice-to-Have
• Load-testing data/analytics platforms, databases
• Resource allocation management, reviewing logs, finding RCA.
• Reproducing and triaging real customer-reported production issues
